content.json:
## App Usage Analytics

What parts of the app are used, how often, and by whom — sourced from frontend `ScreenViewed` and action telemetry in Application Insights. Use the filters below to scope by time range, module, and user.

Users show as their display name where available; older rows (before identity enrichment was deployed) fall back to the Entra ID GUID.

parameters.name: Module
parameters.label: Module
parameters.query: customEvents | where name == 'ScreenViewed' | summarize by module = tostring(customDimensions.module) | where isnotempty(module) | order by module asc

parameters.name: User
parameters.label: User
parameters.query: customEvents | extend u = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.userName), user_AuthenticatedId) | where isnotempty(u) | summarize by u | order by u asc

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'ScreenViewed' | extend module = tostring(customDimensions.module), screen = tostring(customDimensions.screen), userDisplay = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.userName), user_AuthenticatedId) | where '*' in ({Module}) or module in ({Module}) | where '*' in ({User}) or userDisplay in ({User}) | summarize ['Screen views'] = count(), ['Active users'] = dcount(userDisplay), ['Distinct screens'] = dcount(strcat(module, '/', screen))
content.title: Overview

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'ScreenViewed' | extend module = tostring(customDimensions.module), userDisplay = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.userName), user_AuthenticatedId) | where '*' in ({Module}) or module in ({Module}) | where '*' in ({User}) or userDisplay in ({User}) | summarize Hits = count(), Users = dcount(userDisplay) by module | order by Hits desc
content.title: Usage by module

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'ScreenViewed' | extend module = tostring(customDimensions.module), screen = tostring(customDimensions.screen), subScreen = tostring(customDimensions.subScreen), userDisplay = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.userName), user_AuthenticatedId) | where '*' in ({Module}) or module in ({Module}) | where '*' in ({User}) or userDisplay in ({User}) | summarize Hits = count(), Users = dcount(userDisplay) by module, screen, subScreen | order by Hits desc
content.title: Screen and sub-screen usage

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'ScreenViewed' | extend module = tostring(customDimensions.module), screen = tostring(customDimensions.screen), userDisplay = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.userName), user_AuthenticatedId), userEmail = tostring(customDimensions.userEmail) | where '*' in ({Module}) or module in ({Module}) | where '*' in ({User}) or userDisplay in ({User}) | summarize ['Screen views'] = count(), ['Distinct screens'] = dcount(strcat(module, '/', screen)), ['Last seen'] = max(timestamp) by User = userDisplay, Email = userEmail | order by ['Screen views'] desc
content.title: Usage by user

content.query: customEvents | where name != 'ScreenViewed' | extend userDisplay = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.userName), user_AuthenticatedId) | where '*' in ({User}) or userDisplay in ({User}) | summarize Count = count(), Users = dcount(userDisplay) by Event = name | order by Count desc
content.title: Action events

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'ScreenViewed' | extend module = tostring(customDimensions.module), userDisplay = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions.userName), user_AuthenticatedId) | where '*' in ({Module}) or module in ({Module}) | where '*' in ({User}) or userDisplay in ({User}) | summarize ['Screen views'] = count(), ['Active users'] = dcount(userDisplay) by bin(timestamp, 1d) | order by timestamp asc
content.title: Daily trend
